services.headline: PREMIUM
services.descHtml: Every service is built on a foundation of championship experience and pharmaceutical science. No guesswork. No wasted effort.
services.readyDesc: Choose your plan and begin your transformation today.
services.s1Desc: Periodized workout plans built around your goals, equipment, schedule, and recovery capacity.
services.s3Desc: Our flagship total-body transformation program. 12 weeks of structured, progressive, all-inclusive coaching.
services.s4Desc: You're never training alone. Get direct access to Coach Akram via WhatsApp for questions, adjustments, and motivation.
services.s5Desc: Backed by a Doctor of Pharmacy, your program addresses hormonal health, metabolic efficiency, and long-term wellness.
services.s6Desc: Physical transformation starts in the mind. Build discipline, consistency, and the habits that make results permanent.
services.p1Desc: Fill out the assessment form and tell us about your goals, history, and lifestyle.

challenge.headline: 90-DAY
challenge.subtitle: Commit to 3 months of intense, focused transformation. This is our flagship program designed to completely rewire your physique and lifestyle using medical-grade precision.
challenge.w1Desc: Establishing proper movement patterns, sleep protocols, and metabolic flexibility.
challenge.w2Desc: Increasing training volume and strategically adjusting calories for visible changes.
challenge.w3Desc: Aggressive fat loss protocols while preserving lean tissue for the final reveal.
challenge.w4Desc: Strategic deload, body composition peaks. Results photographed and measured.
challenge.descHtml: Our flagship program for those who are serious about radical transformation. We don't just change your body — we re-engineer your lifestyle using science and championship experience.

transformations.headline: CLIENT
transformations.subtitle: Real people, real results. Browse through our wall of transformations and see what 90 days of dedicated work can achieve.

books.headline: THE KNOWLEDGE
books.subtitle: Unlock the exact scientific protocols, nutrition secrets, and training methodologies Dr. Akram uses to build champions.
books.ctaSubtitle: The blueprint to elite performance is in your hands.
books.deliveryNotice: Your physical book will be delivered within 24-48 hours.
books.b1Desc: A complete guide to recomposition and metabolic flexibility.
books.b1LongDesc: Stop guessing your macros. The Nutrition Blueprint provides the exact frameworks Dr. Akram uses to shred fat and build dense muscle simultaneously. Includes flexible dieting protocols, meal timing secrets, and metabolic optimization strategies. Get instant digital access and start transforming today.
books.b2Desc: Stage-ready preparation, muscle building, and aggressive fat loss.
books.b2LongDesc: Designed specifically for the male physique. This extensive guide covers everything from initiating aggressive hypertrophy to the exact peaking protocols used by champion bodybuilders. Learn to manipulate training volume, intensity, and nutrition for maximum aesthetic results.
books.b3Desc: Science-backed strategies for female fitness and health.
books.b3LongDesc: Tailored for the female athlete. Overcome plateaus, optimize training around your biology, and build strong, lean muscle without bulky appearances. This guide strips away industry myths and delivers science-backed protocols for sustainable, long-term female body recomposition.

about.headline: MEET
about.p1: My journey in fitness began with a passion for pushing limits. As a 3-time bodybuilding champion, I've mastered the art of physical transformation. But my approach goes beyond just lifting weights.
about.p2: With a Doctorate in Pharmacy, I bring a unique scientific perspective to coaching. I understand the intricate chemical processes of the body, allowing me to design nutrition and training protocols that are not only effective but also prioritize your long-term health.
about.p3: Since 2019, I've helped over 1,200 individuals achieve their dream physiques. Whether you're a competitive athlete or someone looking to reclaim their health, my mission is to provide you with the tools, knowledge, and support to succeed.
about.c1Desc: Proven excellence in physique development and competition.
about.c2Desc: Deep understanding of biochemistry, pharmacology, and human health.
about.c3Desc: Focus on longevity, metabolic health, and sustainable performance.
about.c4Desc: Years of experience transforming lives with science-backed methods.

footer.desc: Elite performance coaching combining championship-level experience with pharmaceutical science. Transform your body, optimize your health, and push your limits.
